- guard_veto_rate must be numeric rate
- fallback_degraded_status must be 'clear' before nominal escalation (got None)
- artifact_pointer_status must be durable/complete before nominal escalation (got None)
- nominal_escalation_allowed must be true
- success_rate below nominal smoke gate: 0.0000 < 0.8000
